name: Cocoa Crater Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Dairy sour cream, softened Butter or margarine
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: www.hersheys.com
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
2. Prepare the crater filling by stirring together flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl. Add sour cream, butter, eggs, and vanilla; blend on low speed.
3. Beat on medium speed of an electric mixer for 3 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally. Pour batter into prepared pan.
4. Drop half teaspoonfuls of filling about 1 inch apart over top of batter. With a fork, marble the filling lightly over the batter. Sprinkle nuts over top.
5. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the cake portion near the center comes out clean. Cool completely in pan on a wire rack. If desired, sprinkle powdered sugar over top.
Crater Filling:
1. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt butter. Add cocoa, stirring constantly until blended and smooth.
2. In a small bowl, combine powdered sugar, milk, and vanilla. Add the cocoa mixture; beat on high speed of an electric mixer for 2 minutes.
